title: Vimy Ridge Day Act
description: Vimy Ridge Day Act (Vimy Ridge Day Act). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Vimy Ridge Day Act .

provisions.title: Vimy Ridge Day
provisions.content: 2 Throughout Canada, in each and every year, the ninth day of April shall be known as “Vimy Ridge Day”.

provisions.title: Canadian flag at half-mast
provisions.content: 3 In each and every year, on the ninth day of April, the Canadian flag on the Peace Tower shall be lowered at half-mast.

provisions.title: Not a legal holiday
provisions.content: 4 For greater certainty, Vimy Ridge Day will not be considered a legal holiday or a non-juridical day.
